data.name: Deathblight Jormungandr
data.detailed_description:
The Goddess of Mischief, Loki, finds a cursed swamp that isn't of her doing.

Deciding to make this curse her own, she ventures out to explore and conquer the marshland and its inhabbitants for her own machinations.

Upon entering the cursed lands, she finds her powers seriously weakened, and the creatures of the swamp to be uncooperative and even hostile.

Can Loki beat sense into the goblin tribes and transform the malediction into a power of her own?


- A very VERY difficult, unusual RPG Maker meets turn-based combat!

- Complex combat system that punishes skill spam

- Enemies that can telegraph their attacks

- Loki needs to use smart tactical counter-attacks based on the situation

- No grinding (you can avoid unnecessary fights)

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Most modern discrete graphics cards, integrated graphics are not recommended.
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Most modern discrete graphics cards, integrated graphics are not recommended.
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
